title: Patient Services Representative
description: NYU Langone Health is seeking a Patient Services Representative to provide administrative support to our Provo clinic operations. You will schedule appointments, check patients in, collect insurance information, and ensure smooth patient flow through the facility while maintaining a welcoming and professional environment.
responsibilities: Schedule patient appointments and manage appointment calendar
Check patients in and collect demographic and insurance information
Process payments and provide financial information to patients
Greet patients in a friendly and professional manner
Maintain patient records and ensure HIPAA compliance
Communicate appointment changes and provide patient resources

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; some college preferred
skills: Understanding of HIPAA and patient privacy

benefits: Paid time off and employee wellness programs
